heading: Invalidation of certificates of documentation
label: 12135 Invalidation of certificates of documentation
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)1213546:12111(a).In paragraph (2), the words “except for a recreational endorsement” are omitted as unnecessary because a recreational endorsement does not permit a vessel to engage in a trade.
Amendments2025—Par. (2). inserted “or noncitizen national (as such term is described in section 308 of the Immigration and Nationality Act ())” after “citizen”.Pub. L. 119–608 U.S.C. 1408
amendments: Amendments2025—Par. (2). inserted “or noncitizen national (as such term is described in section 308 of the Immigration and Nationality Act ())” after “citizen”.Pub. L. 119–608 U.S.C. 1408

children.text: no longer meets the requirements of this chapter and regulations prescribed under this chapter applicable to the certificate or endorsement; or

is placed under the command of an individual not a citizen or noncitizen national (as such term is described in section 308 of the Immigration and Nationality Act ()) of the United States in violation of .8 U.S.C. 1408section 12131 of this title
